content:
alexcrichton opened PR #13124 from alexcrichton:revert-test to bytecodealliance:main:

This is taking 1h+ to execute in CI sometimes, and the current assumption is that it's related to the large heap size and probably swapping on the host having very long execution times. Nick will work on re-landing this with something that still tests the issue but doesn't take a full heap size, but in the meantime this is a quick revert of just the test to get the merge queue moving again.

  • Explain why this change is needed. If the details are in an issue already,
    this can be brief.

Our development process is documented in the Wasmtime book:

Please ensure all communication follows the code of conduct:
https://github.com/bytecodealliance/wasmtime/blob/main/CODE_OF_CONDUCT.md
-->
